author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice
book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice

title: Canon XXIV.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: (Greek xxvii.)

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That nothing be read in church besides the Canonical Scripture.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Item, that besides the Canonical Scriptures nothing be read in church under the name of divine Scripture.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: But the Canonical Scriptures are as follows:

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Joshua the Son of Nun.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Kings, iv. books.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Chronicles, ij. books.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Five books of Solomon.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Twelve Books of the Prophets.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Macchabees, ij. books.

verses.text: The Gospels, iv. books.

verses.text: The Acts of the Apostles, j. book.

verses.text: The Epistles of Paul, xiv.

verses.text: The Epistles of Peter, the Apostle, ij.

verses.text: The Epistles of John the Apostle, iij.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Epistles of James the Apostle, j.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Epistle of Jude the Apostle, j.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The Revelation of John, j. book.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Let this be sent to our brother and fellow bishop, Boniface, and to the other bishops of those parts, that they may confirm this canon, for these are the things which we have received from our fathers to be read in church.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Ancient Epitome of Canon XXIV.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Let nothing besides the canonical Scriptures be read in church.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This is Canon xxxvj. of Hippo., 393.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The last phrase allowing the reading of the “passions of the Martyrs” on their Anniversaries is omitted from the African code.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: These two books [i.e. the two Maccabees] are mentioned only in Dionysius Exiguus’s copy.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Ap. ult., Can.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: “Boniface,” i.e., Bishop of Rome.
